description: CompositionWhite round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with chest printFittingComfortWash care Light machine wash Do not bleach Warm iron on reverse Do not dry clean Dry flat/reverse Do not scrub Created for the stylishly health conscious lot, this white t-shirt from myntra combines the old and the new.
